absorption: ASK absorption detected at local highs. High positive delta (+593 on previous candle, +266 on current) is failing to push the price higher, indicating sellers are absorbing the buying pressure.
dom_observation: No significant stacked orders, but the price is stalling at the ask despite continuous market buys, confirming absorption.
reasoning: Aggressive buyers are being absorbed by passive sellers at the local high, indicated by high positive delta with no upward price movement, signaling a likely failure of the breakout attempt.
